ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1.TO ADD NSC-SPECIFIC METRO ETHERNET ACCESS PRICES FOR EIGHT LOCATIONS. 2.TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR A CSDES. 3.ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC. 4.ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED. 5.THE ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT REMAINS UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS080) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD ONE(1) OC12 AND FOUR(4) OC3 ACCESS CIRCUITS. 2. TO ADD NON-DOMESTIC NBIP-VPNS PORTS. 3. TO ADD A NBIP-VPNS FEATURE SUPPORTING A TRUSTED INTERNET CONNECTION GATEWAY. 4. TO REDUCE CERTAIN AUDIO CONFERENCING SERVICE PRICES. 5. TO ADD SIX NEW SEDS FOR PLS. 6. TO CORRECT ITEM NUMBER 7 ON THE SECOND PAGE OF THE SF-30 FOR THE MODIFICATION 77. "SUBMITTAL AU0432.02" IS CORRECTED TO READ "SUBMITTAL AU0432.01E".

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS082) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD INTERNET CONNECT SERVICE TO THE INCIDENT RESPONSE SERVICE (INRS). 2. TO ADD BUILDING-SPECIFIC PRICING FOR METRO ETHERNET ACCESS. 3. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR OC3 ACCESS. 4. TO ADD FOUR NEW SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. 5. TO ADD 36 NEW SEDS FOR UNIFIED MESSAGING SERVICE (UMS). 6. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR OC3 ACCESS. 7. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS FOR UMS. 8. TO REDUCE PRICES FOR ONE SED. 9. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR AN ACCESS AVOIDANCE T3. 10. TO REVISE THE DMRC TERM FOR 19 SEDS. 11. TO CORRECT THE PART NUMBER AND ITEM DESCRIPTION FOR ONE SED. 12. TO ADD 17 NEW SEDS FOR IPTELS. 13. TO ADD TWO NEW SEDS FOR IPTELS. 14. TO ADD TWO NEW SEDS FOR MFS. 15. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS083) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD FEATURES TO L2VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON MARCH 9, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0441.01E. 2. FOR ANY TEXT FILES INCLUDED IN THIS MODIFICATION, THE LINE IN THE HEADER "MOD #-TBD/EFFECTIVE DATE-TBD" IS REPLACED WITH "MOD PS083/" WITH THE DATE FROM BLOCK 16C OF PAGE 1 OF THIS MODIFICATION ADDED. THE PORTION OF THE FOOTER REFERENCING THE SUBMITTAL NUMBER IS HEREBY REPLACED WITH "MOD PS083". 3. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC. 4. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED. 5. THE ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT REMAINS UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO REMOVE THE PHYSICAL ADDRESS OF SITE FIELDS AND FOOTNOTES FROM THE FOLLOWING TABLES IN SECTION B:
TABLE B.3.1-3 DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS BY NETWORK SITE CODE MRC EXCEPTION PRICES TABLE B.3.2.1-3 DOMESTIC BROADBAND DSL ACCESS BY NETWORK SITE CODE EXCEPTION PRICES

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS085) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR A CRITICAL ACCESS CONFIGURATION. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON APRIL 9, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0468.01E. 2. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 9, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0469.01E. 3. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR MNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 9, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0470.01E. 4. TO ADD MULTIPLE SERVICES FOR DEDICATED HOSTING SERVICE (DHS), STORAGE SERVICES (SS) AND MANAGED FIREWALL SERVICE (MFS). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0473.01E. EXCLUDED FROM THE AWARD OF THIS SUBMITTAL IS THE TABLE OF CONTENTS FOR THE TECHNICAL VOLUME. 5. TO REDUCE PRICES FOR ONE SED SUPPORTING NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 15, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0474.01P. 6. TO ADD 10 SEDS, PREVIOUSLY DELETED IN MODIFICATION PS071. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 16, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0475.01E. 7. TO ADD FOUR NEW SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 16, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0476.01E. 8. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR OC-48 WIRELINE ACCESS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 22, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0477.01E. 9. TO ADD NSC-SPECIFIC T-3 WIRELINE ACCESS PRICING FOR ONE LOCATION. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 23, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0478.01E. 10. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR A DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS FEATURE. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 26, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0480.01E. 11. TO ADD ONE NEW SED AND ONE NEW DISCOUNT CLASS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON MAY 5, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0489.01E. 12. TO CHANGE THE DMRC TERM FOR ONE SED. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON MAY 5, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0490.01E. 13. TO REDUCE CERTAIN DHS PRICES AND TO EXTEND THE END DATE ON THREE OTHER DHS PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON MAY 5, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0491.01P. 14. TO REDUCE THE PRICE OF ONE NSC-SPECIFIC WIRELINE ACCESS CLIN. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON MAY 5, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0492.01P.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS086) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR MANAGED STORAGE SERVICES. 2. TO ADD 623 NETWORX SITE CODE BASED WIRELINE ACCESS PRICES. 3. TO ADD T1X2 DOMESTIC WIRELESS ACCESS PRICES. 4. TO ADD 17 NEW SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 5. TO MOVE CLINS 760376 AND 760176 FROM TABLE B.3.2.2-3 AND B.3.2.2-4 TO THE THE CORRECT NON-DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET TABLES, B.3.1-4 AND B.3.1-5. 6. TO ADD 23 NEW SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 7. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 8. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR 20 CRITICAL T3 WIRELINE ACCESS CIRCUITS. 9. TO REDUCE PRICES FOR ONE SED. 10. TO ADD NINE NEW SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 11. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR A OC-12. 12. TO ADD AN AUDIO CONFERENCE FEATURE. 13. TO CHANGE THE DMRC TERM FOR ONE SED. 14. TO ADD ONE NEW SED TO SUPPORT PLS. 16. TO ADD NEW IPS ETHERNET PORT AND OVERAGE CLINS FOR THE HI CAP FLEX OPTION. 17. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 18. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR 20 CRITICAL T3 AND T1X4 WIRELINE ACCESS CIRCUITS. 19. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 20. TO REDUCE ONE CPCS PRICE. 21. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR THREE NEW OC3 AND OC12C CIRCUITS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS087) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD ICB PRICES AND CASE NUMBERS FOR CRITICAL T3 ACCESS CIRCUITS, ROUTINE AND CRITICAL OC3C AND OC12C ACCESS CIRCUITS AND A ROUTINE AND DIVERSE OC12C ACCESS CIRCUIT. 2. TO ADD 11 WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 3. TO REVISE CERTAIN ICB CASE NUMBERS DESIGNATE DIFFERENT LOCATIONS. 4. TO ADD 20 CRITICAL DOMESTIC ACCESS WIRELINE CIRCUITS. 5. TO ADD CRITICAL NBIP-VPNS PORTS. 6. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR OC-48 ACCESS. 7. TO ADD 16 WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL
